title: Implement Wave 39 manager dashboard pending actions UI
description: Add a pending-actions section to the manager dashboard, wire manager-safe navigation into handoff or contract detail routes, and preserve the current summary and priorities presentation.
acceptance_criteria: Manager dashboard renders a pending-actions section backed by the new additive endpoint
Each pending action row exposes stable labels and navigation into the relevant existing flow
Current dashboard summary, priorities, and handoff entry points continue to work without regression
